faqs.question: Do you only build websites for professional service businesses?
faqs.answer: That is the main focus, especially businesses where trust, proof, local search, and qualified enquiries matter.

faqs.question: Can you host the website on Hostinger?
faqs.answer: Yes. The site can be uploaded to Hostinger and connected to the client domain.

faqs.question: Do you use WordPress?
faqs.answer: Only when it is the right fit. For many small brochure sites, static HTML/CSS/JS is simpler.

faqs.question: Can you add WhatsApp booking?
faqs.answer: Yes. The website can include click-to-WhatsApp buttons and pre-filled enquiry messages.

faqs.question: How long does a website take?
faqs.answer: Most small sites can be planned, built, reviewed, and launched in around 7-14 days.

faqs.question: What can an AI customer support chatbot help with?
faqs.answer: A simple chatbot can answer common questions, guide visitors to services or pricing, collect audit requests, and hand off to WhatsApp or booking.

faqs.question: Can the chatbot give regulated advice?
faqs.answer: No. It should not provide legal, medical, financial, tax, or regulated professional advice.
